description: Jed thanks the player once all repaired gear is delivered.

do.message: Quest complete: Gather the Broken Gear

description: Collect Ellie's arcade display.
Collect Maddie's busted coffee grinder.
Collect Schoolteacher Kasey's busted projector.
Return the repaired display to Ellie.

do.message: Quest complete: Gather the Broken Gear

description: Return the repaired coffee grinder to Maddie.

do.message: Quest complete: Gather the Broken Gear

description: Return the repaired projector to Schoolteacher Kasey.

do.message: Quest complete: Gather the Broken Gear

description: Camera moves demo.
Caption styles cycle.
Single caption demo.
Cinematic text bar demo.
Color filter demo.
Fade demo.
Flash demo.
Flashback demo.
Letterbox demo on entry.
Short intro when entering the market plaza.
Narration panel demo.
Pan-only demo.
Particles presets at the bay.
Ring demo.
Shake demo.
Speed lines demo.
Tilt test.
Short intro when entering the residential square.
Auto-run VFX showcase when entering the VFX Stage.
Vignette demo.
Demonstrates bar wipe variants.
Zoom and pan test.
Zoom-only demo.
Jed wraps the intro quest and hands over the repair errand.

do.text: Tap the Tinkering Table to lay out the broken parts so Jed can walk you through the fix.

description: Marks the objective when Nova reaches Jed's Scrap & Salvage.
Marks the Town Square objective once the player leaves the Main Road.
Wraps the tutorial once the arcade display is repaired.
Plays Jed's final dialogue after the tinkering tutorial is complete and the screen has closed.

do.message: Jed claps you on the shoulder and promises to deliver the fixed gear.
The repaired gear is ready to return to its owners.

description: Runs Jed's tinkering tutorial once the bench is opened after his prompt.
After the intro, this spawns the player in Nova's bunk and begins the fade-in.
Starts Wake Up Call if the player enters Nova's bunk without active quest state.
Marks Nova's bunk check for Wake Up Call.

actions.message: The bunk is hard, narrow, and still warm from the few hours of sleep you stole from the shift clock. It is not much, but it is yours.

description: Marks Nova's possessions check for Wake Up Call.

actions.message: The cargo netting holds a few tools, a spare ration, and the small metal carving Jed made for you when you were younger.

description: Marks the first route out of the Pit sleeping level.
Marks arrival at Jed's Workshop.
Completes Wake Up Call when Nova opens Jed's workbench after talking to him.
Starts Paperwork when Nova reaches the Transit Checkpoint after Wake Up Call.
Marks the booth objective once Nova reaches Zeke's window.
Marks discovery of Scrapper's hidden rebel cache.
Marks the rebel cache opening and sends Nova back to Scrapper.

actions.message: The cache holds old resistance grenades and names scratched into the lid.

description: Marks entry into the med-bay ventilation route.
Marks the toxic vent patch and sends Nova back to Doc.

actions.message: The vent coughs, then clears. The med-bay can breathe again.

description: Marks the loader startup step in Heavy Lifting.
Marks the cargo movement setup step in Heavy Lifting.
Completes Heavy Lifting when Nova defeats the shielded training guard.
Starts the Lights Out quest the first time Nova wakes up in her house.
Tyson ropes Nova into a ration run once the blackout is resolved.
Handles Tyson's briefing for the ration run.

do.message: Tyson points you toward the ration crate.

description: Marks the ration crate interaction.

do.message: You collected the ration pack for Ollie.

description: Completes the ration delivery.

do.message: Ollie tears into the ration pack and thanks you between bites.

description: Marks the talk-to-Jed step for Fixer's Favor.

do.message: Jed tosses you tools and points toward the bench.

description: Toggle the lights in Nova's House.

do.message: Power surges through the house as the lights flare to life.

on_message: You flip the switch. The lights come on.
off_message: You flip the switch. The room goes dark.

description: Ollie intercepts the player on the Main Road to start the first quest.

actions.note: Victory reveals a tucked maintenance alcove with salvageable bits.
Gives a Noise Maker so the player can attempt a stealth bypass.
A salvaged stabilizer plate needed for final assembly.
Mekk points out a fragment tucked behind a weak panel.

description: Plays the camera test cinematic upon entering Tyson's room.
Runs the full VFX showcase when the player enters the shop.
Activates the Stellarium Mine generator and restores lighting.
Deactivates the Stellarium Mine generator and turns off lighting.
Turns on the west breaker.
Turns off the west breaker.
Turns on the east breaker.
Turns off the east breaker.
Show tutorial after the player loses a combat.

do.message: You were overwhelmed. Try using shields, items, or a different approach.

description: Restores power to the mine and unlocks the adjacent tunnels.

actions.message: The generator hums back to life, unlocking the northern gate.
Some vents open deeper in the mines.
